strengths: Strong SQL and query optimization experience
Hands-on AI tool usage (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini)
Proven dashboarding and reporting (Power BI, Tableau)
ETL and data integration across sources
weaknesses: Limited explicit financial modeling / FP&A experience
No direct B2B SaaS unit-economics examples
No explicit experience with Vitally or Omni
Few explicit predictive modeling / forecasting outcomes
improvement_bullets: Developed predictive models and performed funnel analysis on loan portfolio data, identifying key bottlenecks in conversion funnels and reducing default risk by 15%.
Engineered automated GTM reporting frameworks using SQL and Python to track pipeline metrics and SaaS unit economics, replacing manual spreadsheets with real-time dashboards.
Built and audited financial models in Excel to evaluate customer acquisition costs and retention metrics, providing the leadership team with data-backed revenue forecasts.
Orchestrated AI-driven workflows by deploying custom LLM prompts to synthesize qualitative feedback and automate the generation of first-draft SQL queries for rapid strategic analysis.
Partnered with executive leadership to influence decision-making by translating complex, high-stakes data findings into actionable GTM strategies and financial narratives.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Senior Business Analyst, Go-To-Market Strategy opportunity with Dashlane. I am interested in this opportunity because I am passionate about the intersection of credential security and high-growth enterprise expansion. What interests me about working for Dashlane is its shift toward the Omnix platform and its sophisticated use of AI, which inspires me because it mirrors my own commitment to leveraging automation to drive commercial impact. I believe my advanced proficiency in SQL/Python data modeling and my experience in GTM analytical strategy would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by diagnosing the root cause of systemic bottlenecks before proposing architectural solutions. In fact, at Shine Masters, I identified that manual onboarding workflows were creating a drag on customer acquisition. I automated these intake processes via Zapier and rebuilt our reporting in Power BI, which resulted in a 300% increase in new customer acquisition over 12 months. Ultimately, I know that the Senior Business Analyst, Go-To-Market Strategy role at Dashlane would allow me to bring my technical expertise to build the source of truth for your expanding enterprise funnel. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my stakeholder influence skills. I regularly translated complex, performance-heavy data into clear executive narratives, which directly informed our marketing spend and operational pivots. I am excited by the opportunity to use my background in Python-driven ETL and predictive analytics in working on the Omnix GTM motion at Dashlane. I know that my technical depth in data reconciliation and my operational mindset align with what it takes to succeed at the Senior Business Analyst, Go-To-Market Strategy role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
